title: ocotea patens
intro: Ocotea patens, also known as 'Tetradenia' or 'Wild Orange', is a plant species belonging to the family Lamiaceae. The Ocotea patens plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, and has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The health benefits of Ocotea patens include its potential to aid in digestion, relieve stress and anxiety, and support immune function. Ocotea patens can be prepared as herbal teas, essential oils, or capsules, and is often used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
